analysis_summary.title: Stance/Morale Handler Analysis
analysis_summary.description: Analysis of effect handlers related to stance deployment and morale mechanics in Menace Tactical

handler_base_structure.description: All handlers inherit from SkillEventHandler base class

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to the owning skill instance

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Pointer to the effect configuration data (ScriptableObject)

IsEnabled.description: Returns true if actor is valid and in Deployed stance (actor stance == 1)

IsHidden.description: Returns true when the handler should be hidden from UI

OnBeforeAnySkillUsed.description: For AI-controlled actors in Deployed stance with low AP, removes accuracy/crit multipliers from skills

OnBeingAttacked.description: Applies penalty modifiers when actor in Deployed stance is attacked

OnUpdate.description: Applies property modifiers from Properties array when stance is active

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance with effect data

0x58.name: Properties
0x58.description: Array of property modifiers applied while deployed. Each entry is 12 bytes (PropertyType uint32, Value int32, MultValue float32)

OnAdded.description: Applies morale effect when handler is first added if ApplyToTarget is 0

OnApply.description: Called when skill effect is applied to tile, applies morale if ApplyToTarget is 1

ApplyMorale.description: Applies morale change to target actor based on Mode and Direction

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance with effect data

0x58.name: ApplyToTarget
0x58.description: If 0, applies on skill owner when added. If 1, applies on target tile's actor

values.0: Apply to skill owner on addition

values.2: Set to half of max morale (MoraleMax * 0.5)

values.1: MaxBound - don't lower if already above target
values.2: MinBound - don't raise if already below target

ApplyMorale.description: Applies panic and/or reduces morale level on attack

OnApply.description: Handles attack effect application on target tile's actor

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance with effect data

0x58.name: ApplyPanic
0x58.description: If non-zero, applies morale with panic flag (0x100) to target

0x5C.name: ReduceMoraleLevel
0x5C.description: Number of morale levels to reduce on target

AddEffect.description: Adds EffectSkill to actor when morale reaches max

OnMoraleEvent.description: Triggered on morale change, adds/removes skill based on morale >= max

RemoveEffect.description: Removes EffectSkill when morale drops below max

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance with effect data

0x58.name: EffectSkill
0x58.description: Reference to skill template that gets added when morale is at maximum. The skill is instantiated and added to actor's SkillContainer when morale >= MoraleMax, and removed when morale drops below max.

EntityPropertyType.description: Enum for entity properties that can be modified
